inputs.label: Cement Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of cement in the concrete batch, typically in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of cement in the concrete batch, typically in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beton partisindeki çimento kütlesi, tipik olarak kilogram cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Zements in der Betonmischung, typischerweise in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de ciment dans le lot de béton, généralement en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de cemento en la tanda de hormigón, típicamente en kilogramos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الأسمنت في الخلطة الخرسانية، عادةً بالكيلوغرام.

inputs.label: Water Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of water in the batch, including water in admixtures if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of water in the batch, including water in admixtures if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki su kütlesi, varsa katkılardaki su dahil.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Wassers in der Mischung, einschließlich Wasser in Zusatzmitteln, falls zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse d'eau dans le lot, y compris l'eau des adjuvants si applicable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de agua en el lote, incluyendo agua en aditivos si corresponde.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الماء في الخلطة، بما في ذلك الماء في الإضافات إن وجد.

inputs.label: Fine Aggregate (Sand) Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of fine aggregate (sand) in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of fine aggregate (sand) in the batch.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse der feinen Gesteinskörnung (Sand) in der Mischung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de granulat fin (sable) dans le lot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de agregado fino (arena) en el lote.

inputs.label: Coarse Aggregate Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of coarse aggregate (gravel or crushed stone) in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of coarse aggregate (gravel or crushed stone) in the batch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki iri agrega (çakıl veya kırma taş) kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse der groben Gesteinskörnung (Kies oder Schotter) in der Mischung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de granulat grossier (gravier ou pierre concassée) dans le lot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de agregado grueso (grava o piedra triturada) en el lote.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الركام الخشن (الحصى أو الحجر المكسر) في الخلطة.

inputs.label: Admixture Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of chemical admixtures added (if any), in kilograms. Convert liquid volume to mass using density if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of chemical admixtures added (if any), in kilograms. Convert liquid volume to mass using density if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eklenen kimyasal katkıların kütlesi (varsa), kilogram cinsinden. Sıvı hacmi, yoğunluk kullanılarak kütleye dönüştürülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse der chemischen Zusatzmittel (falls vorhanden) in Kilogramm. Flüssigkeitsvolumen ggf. mit Dichte in Masse umrechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse des adjuvants chimiques ajoutés (le cas échéant), en kilogrammes. Convertir le volume liquide en masse à l'aide de la densité si applicable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de aditivos químicos añadidos (si los hay), en kilogramos. Convierta el volumen líquido a masa usando la densidad si corresponde.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الإضافات الكيميائية المضافة (إن وجدت)، بالكيلوغرام. حوّل الحجم السائل إلى كتلة باستخدام الكثافة إن أمكن.

inputs.label: Fresh Concrete Density
inputs.businessContext: Measured unit weight (density) of the fresh concrete. Typical range: 2200–2500 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured unit weight (density) of the fresh concrete. Typical range: 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taze betonun ölçülen birim ağırlığı (yoğunluğu). Tipik aralık: 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Rohdichte (Dichte) des Frischbetons. Typischer Bereich: 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique mesurée du béton frais. Plage typique : 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso unitario medido (densidad) del concreto fresco. Rango típico: 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن الحجمي (الكثافة) المقاس للخرسانة الطازجة. النطاق النموذجي: 2200–2500 كجم/م³.

inputs.label: Cement Bag Mass
inputs.businessContext: Standard mass of one cement bag (e.g., 50 kg). Used to calculate yield per bag.

label_i18n.es: Masa de la bolsa de cemento

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard mass of one cement bag (e.g., 50 kg). Used to calculate yield per bag.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çimento torbasının standart kütlesi (ör. 50 kg). Torba başına verimi hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardmasse eines Zementsacks (z. B. 50 kg). Wird zur Berechnung der Ausbeute pro Sack verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse standard d'un sac de ciment (ex. 50 kg). Utilisée pour calculer le rendement par sac.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa estándar de una bolsa de cemento (ej., 50 kg). Se utiliza para calcular el rendimiento por bolsa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن القياسي لكيس الأسمنت (مثل 50 كجم). يُستخدم لحساب الإنتاجية لكل كيس.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
